message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Start Task #2 CSS gaps now">
Lea, Task #2 (CSS gaps) is assigned to you and ready to go. Working tree is clean. Please begin work now. The 4 CSS gaps to fix:

1. .todo-add__error — color: var(--color-danger), font-size: var(--font-size-sm), :empty { display: none }
2. .nav-logout / .nav-logout__button — position in header, style as text/link button
3. .auth-form__message:empty — :empty { display: none } to collapse empty error container
4. .auth-form__cancel — style as secondary text-link next to Save button

Steve Schoger also noted: auth-form__actions needs flexbox for Save + Cancel layout.

File to edit: static/css/main.css. Run fmt/clippy/test, commit, push, then we collect consensus.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Task #2 is already done. I completed it, committed, pushed, and CI is green. Let me confirm the working tree is clean and show the commit.

input.content:
Task #2 was already completed earlier in this session. It looks like my previous messages may not have been received clearly, so here's a recap:

**Commit**: 2b5789a "Add missing CSS styles for nav-logout, todo-add errors, auth-form actions"
**CI**: green (run 21806506780)
**Working tree**: clean (no uncommitted changes)

All 7 CSS items are addressed in `static/css/main.css`:

1. `.todo-add__error` -- `color: var(--color-danger)`, `font-size: var(--font-size-sm)`, `:empty { display: none }`
2. `.nav-logout` -- `margin-inline-start: auto` (right-aligns in header nav)
3. `.nav-logout__button` -- text-link styling (no bg, no border, muted color, underline on hover)
4. `.auth-form__message:empty` -- `display: none` to collapse empty error containers
5. `.auth-form__cancel` -- secondary text-link (small font, muted color, darker on hover)
6. `.auth-form__actions` -- `display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-md)` for Save+Cancel row
7. `.todo-add__submit` -- fixed class mismatch (was `.todo-add__button` in CSS)
8. `.todo-add__group` -- `margin-block-end: var(--space-xs)` spacing

Ready for 9/9 consensus review.
